name: harness
description: Harness — agent-first development toolkit. The `harness-cursor` plugin ships skills, slash commands, persona subagents, project rules, hooks, and MCP for Cursor. Sibling plugins (`harness-claude`, `harness-gemini`, `harness-codex`) target the other major AI coding tools.

plugins.name: harness-cursor
plugins.description: Harness for Cursor: every skill, /harness:* slash command, the 12 persona subagents, lifecycle hooks (standard profile), curated project rules, and the harness MCP server in one install. Removes the need to run `harness setup` per repo.
